languages.text: "Я не ослышал{mf|ся|ась}? Мне предлагается бегать по селению, словно служке?"

traits.locale_text: "Я не ослышал{mf|ся|ась}? Мне предлагается бегать по селению, словно служке?"

languages.text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"
languages.original_text: "Я не ослышал{mf|ся|ась}? Мне предлагается бегать по селению, словно служке?"

traits.locale_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"
"I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"
"I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

languages.text: «Debo de haberle oído mal. ¿Está sugiriendo que corretee por el asentamiento como una especie de recadista?».
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: «Debo de haberle oído mal. ¿Está sugiriendo que corretee por el asentamiento como una especie de recadista?».

languages.text: “我怕是听岔了。你这是在建议我，像个仆人似的，在这定居点里跑腿？”
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: “我怕是听岔了。你这是在建议我，像个仆人似的，在这定居点里跑腿？”

languages.text: « J'ai dû mal vous comprendre. Vous voulez que je cavale à travers la colonie comme un vulgaire garçon de courses ? »
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai dû mal vous comprendre. Vous voulez que je cavale à travers la colonie comme un vulgaire garçon de courses ? »

languages.text: "Yanlış duydum herhâlde. Benim yerleşkede bir tür hizmetkâr gibi koşturmamı mı öneriyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: "Yanlış duydum herhâlde. Benim yerleşkede bir tür hizmetkâr gibi koşturmamı mı öneriyorsun?"

languages.text: "Ich muss mich verhört haben. Ihr schlagt vor, dass ich wie irgendein Diener in der Siedlung herumlaufe?"
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss mich verhört haben. Ihr schlagt vor, dass ich wie irgendein Diener in der Siedlung herumlaufe?"

languages.text: 「聞き間違えたに違いない。私がこの集落で何らかの召使いのように走り回っていることを言っているのか？」
languages.original_text: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"

traits.locale_text: 「聞き間違えたに違いない。私がこの集落で何らかの召使いのように走り回っていることを言っているのか？」
